introProse: I grew up in Tehran. In high school — Python 2, a turtle on the screen — I was behind my classmates but I didn't quit. Private institute, C#, then the web: React, Quera, long nights. Internship at ILIA Corporation, frontend at Jaan, and since 2022 Frontend Engineer at Snapp building PWAs at scale. Computer Science at Islamic Azad University (expected 2025). These days I'm also learning Swift & SwiftUI and dipping into Rust. This site tells that story like a game — because that's how learning has always felt to me.

chapterGoals.work: Work · tap ? boxes to reveal jobs
chapterGoals.writing: Résumé chest · tap it, then scroll for posts

intro.text: I still remember that turtle — my first line on the screen.
I wasn't the fastest. I just didn't stop.
The road breaks ahead. Sometimes you have to leap.
I jump — and land on the other side.
Step after step. Institute. C#. Then the web.
React, Quera, long nights — catching up my own way.
ILIA. Jaan. Then Snapp — each step a little bigger.
Islamic Azad University — CS degree, still in progress.
These days: React, Next.js, PWAs — and Swift on the side.
I pause here — but the story keeps going.

work.text: Snapp. Jaan. ILIA. Every role was a bridge.
Millions of users. PWAs. Mobile-first — that's the work I care about.
Haul it up. Lock it in.
Each ? box is a job — tap to see what I built there.
Tap a ? box — I'll tell you what we built.
The crossing holds. On to what's next.

skills.text: TypeScript + React + Next.js — that's production home base.
Architecture & design patterns — how code survives scale.
PWAs, performance, mobile-first — real users, real devices.
UI kit, Redux Toolkit, SWR — systems, not one-off screens.
Testing, CI/CD, quality — ship with confidence.
Tap a skill for the full stats.
Side quests: Swift/SwiftUI, Rust — always learning.

writing.text: When I figured something out, I wrote it down.
The first chest is my résumé — tap it when you're ready.
Scroll right — each chest after that is an article.
Open a chest, read it — it's yours too.
Knowledge only counts if you pass it on.

contact.text: The climb ends on a rooftop over the city.
Tehran at night. Quiet. Full of light.
If any of this felt familiar — let's talk.
Email, GitHub, LinkedIn — one tap away.
Life is a lot like a game. It depends how you play it.
